ddls:
CREATE TABLE "management_packs" (
  "management_pack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each management pack */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the management pack */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the management pack */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the management pack */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the management pack is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_pack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflows" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow */,
  "management_pack_id" INTEGER /* ID of the management pack the workflow belongs to */,
  "workflow_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow type */,
  "display_name" TEXT /* Display name of the workflow */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workflow */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the creation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the workflow is active */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the workflow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflows_workflow_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_type_id") REFERENCES workflow_types ("workflow_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflows_management_pack_id FOREIGN KEY ("management_pack_id") REFERENCES management_packs ("management_pack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "override_parameters" (
  "override_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each override parameter */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow the override parameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the override parameter */,
  "override_parameter_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the override parameter type */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the override parameter */,
  "test_value" TEXT /* Test value of the override parameter */,
  "qa_value" TEXT /* QA value of the override parameter */,
  "production_value" TEXT /* Production value of the override parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the creation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the override parameter is active */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("override_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_override_parameters_override_parameter_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("override_parameter_type_id") REFERENCES override_parameter_types ("override_parameter_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_override_parameters_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the creation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the note */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "override_parameter_values" (
  "override_parameter_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each override parameter value */,
  "override_parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the override parameter the value belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the override parameter */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("override_parameter_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_override_parameter_values_override_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("override_parameter_id") REFERENCES override_parameters ("override_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_override_parameter_values_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflow_types" (
  "workflow_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the workflow type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workflow type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "management_pack_workflows" (
  "management_pack_id" INTEGER /* ID of the management pack */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_pack_id", "workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "override_parameter_types" (
  "override_parameter_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each override parameter type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the override parameter type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the override parameter type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("override_parameter_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflow_environments" (
  "workflow_environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow environment */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the workflow in the specific environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflow_environments_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflow_environments_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflow_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow */,
  "dependent_workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent workflow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflow_dependencies_dependent_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflow_dependencies_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflow_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., INFO, ERROR) */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflow_logs_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflow_logs_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)
